misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, representing the distinguished Hirsala Golf, is set to embark on his eleventh appearance at the esteemed Hector Trophée. This remarkable streak of participation underscores a profound and unwavering commitment to the tournament's distinctive pairs format, establishing him as a seasoned and respected fixture within the event's competitive landscape.

His record within the Hector Trophée is particularly notable for his exceptional aptitude in the team-based format. Simo has triumphantly secured the coveted Hector Trophée for his partnerships on three separate occasions, a testament to his strategic insight and collaborative excellence on the course. While his individual pursuit of the Victor Trophy has yet to yield a title, his consistent success in the main competition highlights his invaluable contribution to team dynamics.

Beyond his formidable on-course abilities, Simo is known for a spirited and intense approach to the game, occasionally punctuated by a notably expressive vocabulary. This ardent dedication to performance also fuels a continuous drive for refinement in his equipment and technique, evidenced by his strategic adoption of a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season, a precise adjustment aimed at optimizing his putting prowess.

As Simo prepares for the Hector Trophée 2026, he remains a compelling competitor. His unique blend of deep experience, tactical intelligence, and an undeniable passion for the game ensures his ongoing presence will be both impactful and captivating, as he relentlessly strives for further team accolades.
